\tzpentry{ID3311}{Hamiltonian Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3311 introduces Hamiltonian Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_ \text{ac} = \int_V \mathbf{ \Psi}_ \text{ac} \cdot ( \nabla \times \mathbf{u}) \, d^3x \end{equation}
